source: Public Service Commission of West Virginia
company: Appalachian Power Company and Wheeling Power Company
company_raw: Appalachian Power Company and Wheeling Power Company
source_note: Commission Order in the annual Expanded Net Energy Cost (ENEC) review of Appalachian Power Company and Wheeling Power Company (AEP), West Virginia PSC Case No. 23-0377-E-ENEC (consolidated with 22-0393-E-ENEC and 21-0339-E-ENEC), entered January 9, 2024 — disallowing $231.8 million of the requested ENEC under-recoveries as imprudent (coal-stockpiling practices) and assessing the remaining ~$321.1 million over a ten-year period with a 4% carrying charge. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: WV PSC WebDocket, document CaseActivityID 616349 (case activities list: psc.state.wv.us/scripts/WebDocket/tblCaseActivitiesList.cfm?CaseID=82133).
